name: pr-review
description: Self-contained PR review plugin. Bundles a pinned snapshot of the official code-review workflow and executes it inline — no dependency on a separately-installed code-review plugin. Adds a 'submit as PR review' mode (single batched GitHub PR review via gh api), opt-in ticket-context fetching (Backlog/Jira/GitHub Issues/Linear via REST or MCP), a setup wizard, and a guarded drift-check workflow for the pinned snapshot.

code-review.note: Update review/SKILL.md, snapshot under state/code-review-pinned/, then bump this version when accepting an upstream change. Run /pr-review:check-code-review-updates to drive the review.
